challenges.title: Basic Typography
challenges.description: Write CSS for a `body` selector that sets `font-family` to a sans-serif stack (Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif), `font-size` to 16px, and `line-height` to 1.5. Assign your CSS to the variable `css`.
challenges.test_code:
assert 'body' in css.lower(), 'Should target the body selector'
assert 'font-family' in css.lower(), 'Should use font-family'
assert 'sans-serif' in css.lower(), 'Should include sans-serif in the font stack'
assert 'font-size' in css.lower(), 'Should use font-size'
assert '16px' in css.lower(), 'Should set font-size to 16px'
assert 'line-height' in css.lower(), 'Should use line-height'
assert '1.5' in css.lower(), 'Should set line-height to 1.5'
hints: Font stacks list fonts in order of preference, ending with a generic family.
line-height without a unit (like 1.5) is a multiplier of the font-size.

challenges.title: Font Face and Text Transform
challenges.description: Write CSS that declares a `@font-face` rule with `font-family` set to 'CustomFont' and `src` using a `url('custom.woff2')` with `format('woff2')`. Then write a rule for `.heading` that uses `font-family: 'CustomFont', serif`, sets `text-transform` to `uppercase`, and `letter-spacing` to 2px. Assign your CSS to the variable `css`.
challenges.test_code:
assert '@font-face' in css.lower(), 'Should include a @font-face rule'
assert 'font-family' in css.lower(), 'Should set font-family in @font-face'
assert 'src' in css.lower(), 'Should include src in @font-face'
assert 'url(' in css.lower(), 'Should use url() for the font source'
assert 'woff2' in css.lower(), 'Should reference a woff2 font file'
assert '.heading' in css.lower(), 'Should target the .heading selector'
assert 'text-transform' in css.lower(), 'Should use text-transform'
assert 'uppercase' in css.lower(), 'Should set text-transform to uppercase'
assert 'letter-spacing' in css.lower(), 'Should use letter-spacing'
assert '2px' in css.lower(), 'Should set letter-spacing to 2px'
hints: @font-face lets you load custom fonts: @font-face { font-family: 'Name'; src: url('file.woff2') format('woff2'); }
text-transform: uppercase converts all text to capital letters.
